use_codes.desc: A METHOD FOR ADMINISTERING A THERAPEUTIC DOSE OF EPINEPHRINE

indications.text:
SYMJEPI is indicated in the emergency treatment of allergic reactions (Type I) including anaphylaxis
to stinging insects (e.g., order Hymenoptera, which include bees, wasps, hornets, yellow jackets and
fire ants) and biting insects (e.g., triatoma, mosquitoes), allergen immunotherapy, foods, drugs,
...
